featureName: Gestion des dates d'expiration sur les documents
description: Ajouter la gestion des dates de validité/expiration sur les documents dans les flows de création de contrat/bail, immeuble et lots. Les slots qui ont hasExpiry=true affichent un date picker pour la date d'expiration, avec des badges visuels (vert=valide, orange=expire bientôt, rouge=expiré).

userStories.title: Wire expiry props dans DocumentChecklistGeneric
userStories.description: As a developer, I want DocumentChecklistGeneric to forward hasExpiry/expiryDate/onExpiryDateChange to each DocumentSlotGeneric so the expiry UI (already built) is activated
acceptanceCriteria: All 3 render sites (recommended, optional, autre) pass hasExpiry + expiryDate + onExpiryDateChange
Property doc hooks (usePropertyDocumentUpload, useMultiLotDocumentUpload) expose setSlotExpiryDate
BuildingContactsStepV3 passes setSlotExpiryDate to both building and per-lot checklists
userStories.notes: Added onSetSlotExpiryDate to DocumentChecklistGeneric. Forwards hasExpiry from slot config, derives expiryDate from slot.files[0]?.expiryDate. Added setSlotExpiryDate to usePropertyDocumentUpload and useMultiLotDocumentUpload. Wired in BuildingContactsStepV3 and lot creation page.

userStories.title: Ajouter hasExpiry aux configs de slots lease
userStories.description: As a developer, I want lease document slot configs to support hasExpiry and defaultValidityYears so that relevant lease documents (attestation_assurance) show the expiry UI
acceptanceCriteria: DocumentSlotConfig interface has hasExpiry? and defaultValidityYears?
attestation_assurance slot has hasExpiry: true, defaultValidityYears: 1
userStories.notes: Extended DocumentSlotConfig with hasExpiry and defaultValidityYears. Configured attestation_assurance with 1-year validity.

userStories.title: Ajouter support expiry dans les hooks contract
userStories.description: As a developer, I want useContractUpload and useContractUploadByCategory to support expiry dates so contract documents can track validity
acceptanceCriteria: useContractUpload sends expiryDate in FormData during upload
userStories.notes: Added expiryDate to ContractFileWithPreview. Added setFileExpiryDate to base hook. setSlotExpiryDate in category hook updates all files of a type. Upload sends expiryDate in FormData.

userStories.title: Wire expiry dans wrappers lease + migration DB
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the lease creation flow to show date pickers for documents with expiry (e.g., attestation_assurance) and persist expiry dates to the database
acceptanceCriteria: contract-form-container extracts setSlotExpiryDate and passes to DocumentChecklist
Migration adds expiry_date column to contract_documents table
Upload API stores expiry_date when provided
userStories.notes: Updated DocumentChecklist and DocumentSlot wrappers. contract-form-container extracts setSlotExpiryDate from hook. Migration 20260217100000 adds expiry_date DATE to contract_documents. Upload API conditionally inserts expiry_date.
